steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8765/product-line.html
steps.observed: Page loaded with title 产品线观察 - 翡翠信号图谱

steps.action: Take full-page snapshot
steps.expected: All 4 product lines visible: 项链/吊坠, 耳饰, 戒指, 手串/叠戴
steps.observed: All 4 product line sections displayed as h2 headings: 项链/吊坠, 耳饰, 戒指, 手串/叠戴

assertions.title: Strengthening and weakening directions per line

steps.action: Inspect each product line section in snapshot
steps.expected: Each shows 助推方向 (strengthening) and 拖累方向 (weakening) with direction names and rationale
steps.observed: Each product line has 📈 助推方向 and 📉 拖累方向 subsections. 项链/吊坠: 2 strengthening (18K 金镶翡翠, 冰感小件吊坠), 0 weakening. 耳饰: 1 strengthening (多巴胺色系耳饰), 0 weakening. 戒指: 0 strengthening, 1 weakening (18K 金镶翡翠). 手串/叠戴: 1 strengthening (沉香 + 翡翠叠戴), 0 weakening. Each direction shows name, heat percentage, judgment tag, and brief rationale.

steps.action: Inspect each product line section
steps.expected: Each displays opportunity level and risk level with visual indicators
steps.observed: Each product line has color-coded badges: 项链/吊坠 (机会: 高, 风险: 低中), 耳饰 (机会: 中高, 风险: 中), 戒指 (机会: 中, 风险: 中高), 手串/叠戴 (机会: 中, 风险: 中). Badges use green for opportunity and orange/red tones for risk.

assertions.title: Product Line Watch content is entirely in Chinese

steps.action: Review all visible text on product-line.html via snapshot and screenshot
steps.expected: All text in Chinese, no English UI labels
steps.observed: All content is in Chinese: page title 产品线观察, product line names, status labels (整体状态: 上升/高潜但不稳定/证据不足/当前人群更稳), section headers (助推方向/拖累方向), badge text (机会/风险), direction names, rationale text. Navigation is in Chinese. No English UI labels found.

assertions.title: Product line snapshot links to product line watch

steps.action: Navigate to homepage and find product line snapshot module
steps.expected: Product line links visible in snapshot module
steps.observed: Product line snapshot module shows 项链/吊坠, 耳饰, 戒指, 手串/叠戴 as clickable links

steps.action: Click 项链/吊坠 link

assertions.title: Judgment state vocabulary is consistent across pages

steps.action: Check homepage Movement Board for judgment labels
steps.expected: Only 值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据 used
steps.observed: Homepage uses: 值得跟, 观察中, 需要补证据, 短热噪音. No non-canonical judgment labels found.

steps.action: Check Direction Map for judgment labels
steps.observed: Direction Map uses: 值得跟, 观察中, 需要补证据, 短热噪音 as badge filters and card labels.

steps.action: Check Direction Detail for judgment labels
steps.observed: Direction Detail (dir_001) uses: 值得跟 in hero and in product-line decision cards. Only canonical labels present.

assertions.title: Judgment states use consistent visual color coding

steps.action: Extract computed styles for judgment badges on homepage
steps.expected: Each state has distinct, consistent color

steps.action: Extract computed styles for judgment badges on Direction Map
steps.observed: Identical colors: 值得跟 green, 观察中 blue, 短热噪音 orange, 需要补证据 gray — exact same RGB values

steps.action: Extract computed styles for judgment badges on Direction Detail
steps.observed: 值得跟 uses same green color. Hero area variant uses white-on-transparent for contrast on dark green background, but the color identity (green) is maintained. Standard badge uses identical rgb(16,185,129) on rgb(209,250,229).

assertions.title: No JavaScript console errors on any page

steps.observed: Zero JavaScript console errors

steps.observed: Zero JavaScript console errors

steps.observed: Zero JavaScript console errors

steps.observed: Zero JavaScript console errors

evidence.consoleErrors: none on all 5 pages (homepage, direction-map, direction-detail, product-line, evidence)

summary: Tested 9 assertions: all 9 passed. Product Line Watch displays all 4 product lines with strengthening/weakening directions, opportunity/risk levels, and fully Chinese content. Navigation works across all pages. Judgment state vocabulary (值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据) and color coding are consistent across homepage, direction map, and direction detail. Zero JavaScript console errors on all 5 pages.
